name: Sterling Shroud
short_description: Sterling Shroud is a point-and-click atmospheric horror game with a focus on navigation and puzzle solving. Can you escape the forest alive?
detailed_description:
Sterling Shroud is a point-and-click atmospheric horror game with a focus on navigation and puzzle solving.

Lost on a camping trip gone wrong, there is only one way out of this sinister place. Solve point-and-click puzzles to escape and uncover the dark secrets of this forest, and navigate your way out with the help of your trusty map.

Will you make it out alive? Or will you become yet another missing person?
